name: AKK-WST01 overweight or obese type 2 diabetes randomized trial
summary: Randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled 12-week trial testing Akkermansia muciniphila AKK-WST01 plus routine lifestyle guidance in adults with overweight or obese type 2 diabetes.
population: Adults with overweight or obese type 2 diabetes

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Live Biotherapeutics and Engineered Microbes because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers, mechanistic endpoints, and safety in Adults with overweight or obese type 2 diabetes. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
